sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Advisor Moves: Raymond James nabs Beverly Hills advisor from Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Raymond James has hired financial advisor Thomas K. Sutter from Morgan Stanley to join its employee advisor channel in Beverly Hills, California. Sutter, who managed approximately $160 million in client assets at Morgan Stanley, will now serve as managing director and senior vice president of wealth management at Highmark Capital Management of Raymond James. This move is part of a trend where Raymond James has been actively recruiting advisors from Morgan Stanley.

feed.title: This Is Why BMO Capital Raised Duke Energy (DUK)’s Price Target
feed.summary: BMO Capital reiterated an "Outperform" rating on Duke Energy Corporation (DUK) and increased its price target to $143 from $136. This positive outlook is driven by the company's long-term prospects, particularly given expected large-scale onboarding activities and the potential for earnings growth from data center uptake. The recent sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business will also help Duke Energy fund its capital plan and reduce debt.

feed.title: KLA Corp (KLAC) Stock Up 3.3% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 94/100
feed.summary: KLA Corp (KLAC) shares rose 3.3% to $1791.44, but GuruFocus' GF Value indicates the stock is significantly overvalued by 93.1%, with an intrinsic value of $927.70. Despite a strong GF Score of 94/100, driven by excellent profitability and growth, its valuation score is low at 3/10. The current P/E ratio of 52.1x is also well above its historical median, suggesting caution for investors due to the lack of a margin of safety.

feed.title: 5 Trends to Watch in a Post-Iran War Landscape
feed.summary: This article discusses five key trends for investors to watch in the aftermath of the Iran war, including a better risk-reward balance for stocks, higher oil prices remaining for longer, a renewed focus on energy efficiency and renewables, a potential rebound for gold due to increased fiscal spending and inflation concerns, and a continued push towards reshoring for national security. The authors suggest that while the immediate conflict may resolve, its long-term economic and geopolitical ramifications will shape investment strategies.

feed.title: A Look at Merck & Co Inc (MRK) After 3.1% Gain -- GF Value $117.
feed.summary: Merck & Co Inc (MRK) saw its shares rise 3.1% to $119.07, but GuruFocus indicates the stock is 1.2% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $117.69. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 85/100, insider selling of $40.1 million over three months with no buying activity suggests caution for potential investors. The company's P/E ratio of 16.4x is below its 5-year median, aligning with a "fairly valued" assessment by GF Valuation.

feed.title: Autodesk donates $1.95 million to Howard University and celebrates the opening of new makerspace
feed.summary: Autodesk has donated $1.95 million to Howard University to establish a new Construction Engineering Management program and support the recently opened College of Engineering and Architecture (CEA) Makerspace. This initiative aims to prepare students for the digital future of the construction industry by providing access to advanced technologies and hands-on learning experiences. The partnership builds on a previous $5 million donation from Autodesk in 2024, emphasizing a shared commitment to expanding opportunities and addressing the industry's workforce needs.

feed.title: Is Yum Brands (YUM) Fairly Priced After Recent Pullback And DCF Valuation Estimate
feed.summary: Simply Wall St analyzes Yum! Brands (YUM) valuation after a recent pullback, finding it fairly valued by a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model, suggesting a 1.9% discount from its intrinsic value of $162.65. However, its P/E ratio of 28.26x is above the industry average and slightly above its "Fair Ratio" of 26.96x, indicating it might be slightly overvalued by this metric. The article encourages investors to consider different valuation narratives and company-specific characteristics.

feed.title: Is Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) a Top Utility Stock on Earnings Growth Prospects?
feed.summary: Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) is highlighted as a top utility stock, with BMO Capital reiterating a Market Perform rating and raising its price target to $91. Despite a slight downward revision in the Q1 2026 earnings estimate, the company anticipates over 7% earnings growth in 2026 due to significant investments in regulated infrastructure. PEG, a regulated energy company operating in New Jersey, plans substantial capital spending in regulated assets, emphasizing its commitment to growth and customer

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Asserts Dominance on Clean Energy with Calvert Cliffs Clean Energy Upgrades
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) has completed $90 million in equipment upgrades at its Calvert Cliffs Clean Energy Center, underscoring its commitment to clean energy and its dominance in the utility sector. This nuclear plant powers over 1.3 million homes with emission-free energy and significantly contributes to the local economy. The company anticipates strong earnings growth and plans to expand its capacity, solidifying its position as the largest U.S. producer of clean, carbon-free energy.

feed.title: Revolution Medicines (NASDAQ: RVMD) issues $500M 0.50% convertible notes due 2033
feed.summary: Revolution Medicines, Inc. has issued $500 million of 0.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2033. These senior unsecured notes carry a low interest rate, mature on May 1, 2033, and are convertible into common stock under specific conditions, implying an initial conversion price of approximately $198.80 per share. The offering, underwritten by J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, TD Securities (USA) LLC, and Guggenheim Securities, LLC, provides the company with significant financing while managing potential future equity dilution.

feed.title: This Is Why NRG Energy (NRG) Is a Top Utility Stock on Data Center Growth
feed.summary: NRG Energy (NRG) is identified as a top utility stock due to its strategic focus on data center growth. Jefferies recently raised its price target for NRG Energy, expecting the company to announce a 1GW combined-cycle gas turbine project with a hyperscaler. The company aims to capitalize on the AI boom, projecting significant EBITDA growth from data center expansion.

feed.title: Trimble (TRMB) senior VP adds stock through RSU and performance awards
feed.summary: Christopher F. Keating, Senior VP of Transportation at Trimble Inc. (TRMB), reported significant equity compensation activity, including the exercise of 5,767 restricted stock units, receipt of additional common stock grants, and shares withheld for tax obligations. Following these transactions, Keating directly holds 10,494.03 shares of Trimble common stock. The awards were based on a Combined Attainment Factor linked to Annual Recurring Revenue, Total Shareholder Return, and a People & Planet modifier.

feed.title: Trimble (TRMB) SVP Peter Large details stock awards and tax withholding in Form 4
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. Senior Vice President Peter Large reported equity compensation and related tax withholding transactions. He exercised restricted stock units for 6,582 shares and received additional grants totaling 18,252 shares. The company retained 10,165 shares to cover tax obligations, and after these transactions, Large directly holds approximately 31,317 shares of Trimble common stock.

feed.title: eBay SVP Sweetnam sells $1.2 million in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jordan Douglas Bradley Sweetnam, SVP, Chief Commercial Officer at eBay, sold 12,113 shares of common stock for approximately $1.2 million on April 15, 2026. The sales were executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This transaction occurred as eBay's shares have risen 56% over the past year and are trading near their 52-week high, with InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock is overvalued.

feed.title: Paramount Skydance (NASDAQ: PSKY) CFO vests 187,500 RSUs; shares withheld for tax
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance's CFO, Dennis Cinelli, had 187,500 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) vest into Class B common shares on April 15, 2026. This was a scheduled equity compensation event, not an open-market purchase. To cover tax obligations, 88,974 Class B shares were withheld by the company at a reference price of $11.67 per share.

feed.title: Zero Homes Selected by Xcel Energy to Lead Neighborhood Retrofit Program Bringing Whole-Home Electrification to Denver and Aurora
feed.summary: Zero Homes has been chosen by Xcel Energy to lead a $10 million Neighborhood Residential Retrofit Program in Denver and Aurora. This pilot program aims to study the cost-effectiveness of electrifying homes versus maintaining gas infrastructure by offering significant incentives for whole-home energy upgrades. The initiative will provide deeply discounted upgrades, with some income-qualified homeowners receiving 100% coverage, and will gather crucial data to inform future utility investments in clean energy.

feed.title: Starbucks Wins Fifth Circuit Challenge to NLRB Subpoena Ruling
feed.summary: The US Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit has ruled that the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) was wrong to find Starbucks Corp. in violation of federal labor law due to overly broad subpoenas issued to workers. The court stated that the NLRB incorrectly applied a legal test for quashing subpoenas to determine civil liability. The case has been sent back to the NLRB for reconsideration under the correct legal standard, which focuses on whether the company's conduct was coercive based on the totality of circumstances.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On April 17th, 513.84K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.63 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On April 17th, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ.US) saw significant options trading activity, with 513.84K contracts traded. Call options constituted 59.22% of these transactions. The open interest for TQQQ reached approximately 1.63 million contracts, which is 103.84% of its 30-day average.

feed.title: Texas Commission Approves Oncor Rate Increase Benefiting Sempra
feed.summary: The Public Utility Commission of Texas has approved a rate increase for Oncor, Sempra Energy's majority-owned subsidiary, boosting its annual revenue requirement to $6.97 billion, an 8.7% increase. This decision also adjusts Oncor's capital structure and authorized return on equity, and raises its self-insurance reserve recovery, which is expected to enhance Oncor's financial performance and strengthen Sempra's regulated utility earnings in Texas. Despite some weakening financial trends, Spark's AI Analyst rates Sempra Energy (SRE) as Neutral due to positive technicals and clear long-term growth plans.

feed.title: Director-linked trust trims Rush Street Interactive (RSI) stake after unit conversion
feed.summary: A revocable trust associated with Rush Street Interactive director Judith Gold converted 48,286 Class A Common Units into an equal number of Class A Common Stock shares, concurrently canceling Class V Voting Stock. The trust then sold these 48,286 Class A shares at a weighted average price of $23.071 per share under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After these transactions, Gold directly holds 119,597 shares of Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) investors approve board, auditor but reject written-consent plan
feed.summary: Texas Instruments stockholders approved all board nominees, the executive compensation plan, and the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as their independent registered public accounting firm for 2026 at their annual meeting. However, they rejected a stockholder proposal that would have allowed action by written consent. The company filed an 8-K detailing these voting results from the April 16, 2026 meeting.

feed.title: Bell Textron establishes Ukraine subsidiary to support helicopter cooperation and long-term industrial partnership plans
feed.summary: Bell Textron has announced the establishment of Bell Textron Ukraine, a new subsidiary aimed at fostering long-term industrial cooperation within Ukraine's defense sector, focusing on helicopter assembly, maintenance, and repair. This move follows Letters of Intent signed in October with Ukraine's Ministry of Economy, Ecology and Agriculture to explore collaboration opportunities. The company, a producer of commercial and military aircraft including the H-1 platforms, plans for this subsidiary to be a hub for its activities and expand its industrial footprint in the country.

feed.title: RSI (RSI) CEO Schwartz sells 61,765 shares in planned trade
feed.summary: Rush Street Interactive (RSI) CEO Richard Todd Schwartz sold 61,765 shares of Class A Common Stock at a weighted average price of $22.5963 per share, totaling approximately $1.40 million. The sale was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, and after the transaction, Schwartz directly holds 374,036 shares. The shares were sold in multiple transactions ranging from $22.38 to $23.00, as detailed in the SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: McKesson Wundversorgung (B2B/Homecare): Supply chain resilience drives hidden growth potential
feed.summary: McKesson's wound care solutions, particularly in B2B and homecare, are highlighted as a significant growth area driven by increasing rates of chronic diseases and an aging population. The article emphasizes McKesson's robust supply chain, strategic acquisitions, and focus on sustainability, which differentiate it from competitors and ensure stability amid market shifts. Investors are encouraged to monitor this segment's potential for reliable dividends and margin expansion through private labels and global growth.

feed.title: Blackstone-backed Liftoff files for US IPO
feed.summary: Liftoff, a mobile app marketing provider backed by Blackstone, has filed for an initial public offering (IPO) in the United States. This move comes after the company postponed its IPO earlier in February due to a selloff in software and IT-linked stocks, driven by investor concerns over GenAI offerings. Liftoff plans to list on the Nasdaq under the symbol "LFTO," with Goldman Sachs, Jefferies, and Morgan Stanley serving as lead book-running managers.

feed.title: Significant vote against A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) director as Board keeps her
feed.summary: A. O. Smith Corporation's Annual Meeting of Stockholders on April 13, 2026, saw a director, Dr. Ilham Kadri, receive more "withheld" than "for" votes, triggering the company's Director Resignation Policy. Despite her conditional resignation, the Nominating and Governance Committee and the full Board rejected it, citing her skills and contributions and attributing the opposition to concerns over the company's dual-class capital structure rather than her individual performance. Consequently, Dr. Kadri remains on the Board.

feed.title: Boeing Company (BA) Announces Results of Annual Shareholder Meeting
feed.summary: The Boeing Company (BA) held its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on April 17, 2026, where key proposals were voted upon. The results of these decisions, which influence the company's strategic direction, have been released. Investors and stakeholders can find more details on GuruFocus.com regarding the voting outcomes and Boeing's future plans.

feed.summary: Quanterix COO Michael Francis Miller exercised 1,558 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into common stock on April 15, 2026. To cover tax obligations from these vesting events, 467 shares were withheld and disposed of at $3.60 per share. Following these transactions, Miller directly holds 32,522 shares of Quanterix common stock.

feed.summary: Rockwell Automation director David A. Zapico was granted 229 shares of common stock on April 16, 2026, as compensation for his service under the company’s 2026 Long-Term Incentives Plan. The shares were acquired at no cash price. Following this transaction, Zapico directly holds 229 shares of Rockwell Automation.

feed.title: Kinder Morgan (KMI) pipelines VP sells 1,550 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Michael P. Garthwaite, VP and President of Products Pipelines at Kinder Morgan, Inc. (KMI), sold 1,550 shares of Class P Common Stock at a weighted average price of $31.721 per share. This sale was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 9, 2025. Following the transaction, Garthwaite directly holds 44,843 shares of Kinder Morgan stock.

feed.title: Quanterix (NASDAQ: QTRX) CFO nets shares after RSU vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: Quanterix (NASDAQ: QTRX) CFO Sriram Vandana received shares through the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 15, 2026. A total of 1,833 shares across three tranches converted into common stock, with a portion withheld for tax obligations rather than being sold in the open market. Following these transactions, the CFO directly holds 28,713 shares of Quanterix common stock.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. stock (US59156R1086): Why does its global insurance scale matter more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: MetLife's global presence in life insurance, annuities, and employee benefits positions it for steady growth amidst current market volatility, driven by diversified revenue streams and a focus on long-term stability. The company's strategic approach combines digital transformation with expansion into high-growth areas, utilizing its vast scale to maintain competitive pricing and broad distribution while appealing to conservative investors focused on consistent cash flow and dividends. Analysts view MetLife as a solid hold, highlighting its resilience and capital return potential, despite risks from interest rate fluctuations and regulatory changes.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. stock (US59156R1086): Why does its global insurance scale matter more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. (US59156R1086) is highlighted as a stable investment due to its global scale in life insurance, annuities, and employee benefits, which diversifies revenue streams and buffers against regional economic downturns. The article emphasizes how MetLife's predictable cash flow model, strategic digital transformation, and focus on high-growth retirement services position it well for resilience amidst changing markets and geopolitical risks, appealing to conservative U.S. and English-speaking investors seeking long-term stability and consistent dividends.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Shareholders Approve Governance Amendments and Elections
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy shareholders approved amendments to the company's Articles of Incorporation on April 16, 2026, including limited officer exculpation, and re-elected all director nominees. Investors also ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the 2026 independent auditor and approved executive compensation, solidifying governance stability despite some nuanced investor sentiment on executive liability protection. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates CNP as Neutral due to a positive forward outlook offset by negative free cash flow, elevated leverage, and moderate valuation.

feed.title: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) Stock Price Up 1.7% Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) shares rose 1.7% after DBS Bank upgraded its price target to $400, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts. Despite recent insider selling totaling over $104 million, institutional investors hold a significant 40.03% stake. Key points include strong quarterly earnings, ongoing product innovation with AI, and strategic infrastructure deals, though the company faces potential margin pressure from rising costs and regulatory risks in the EU.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ:COST) Trading Up 1.3% Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ:COST) saw its stock rise by 1.3% after JPMorgan Chase & Co. increased its price target to $1,110 and maintained an overweight rating. The company also announced a 13.1% increase in its quarterly dividend to $1.47, reflecting strong cash flow. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Costco with an average price target of $1,045.97, following robust March sales and positive corporate news.

feed.title: Dr Pepper: Amid Geopolitical Volatility, Beverage Stability Stands Out
feed.summary: Amidst global geopolitical volatility affecting various markets, Dr Pepper and its parent company, Keurig Dr Pepper, offer a rare anchor of stability for investors. The article highlights the enduring appeal of Dr Pepper as a consumer staple due to its consistent demand and less reliance on disrupted commodities compared to other sectors. This positions Keurig Dr Pepper favorably for steady revenue in 2026, driven by resilient consumer habits and strategic diversification despite competition and market risks.

feed.title: Director adds stock in Alexandria Real Estate (NYSE: ARE) via 407-share grant
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. director Michael A. Woronoff was granted 407 shares of common stock on April 15, 2026, at no cash cost. This compensation-related award increased his direct holdings to 27,286 shares, with an additional 1,400 shares indirectly held through a trust. The Form 4 filing indicates no open-market purchases or sales by Woronoff.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor (ON) CFO Trent sells 30,000 common shares
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor's Executive VP & CFO, Thad Trent, sold 30,000 shares of common stock at $80.00 per share on April 16, 2026, totaling $2.4 million. Following this open-market transaction, Trent directly holds 331,194 shares, which includes an additional 115 shares acquired through the company's Employee Stock Purchase Plan. The sale is categorized as having a negative filing sentiment and a very high impact.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Inc stock (US98389B1008): Is clean energy transition now the real test for steady return
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc (US98389B1008) is at a critical juncture, navigating increased demand from AI data centers and electrification while pushing for a clean energy transition. The company's strategy involves significant investments in renewables and grid modernization, aiming for 80% carbon-free electricity by 2030, supported by a regulated business model and stable dividends. Analysts view Xcel favorably for its defensive qualities and growth potential from clean energy capital expenditures, but investors should monitor interest rate sensitivity, regulatory recovery, and project execution risks.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. stock (US8725901040): Is its 5G leadership strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. is highlighted as a leader in the U.S. wireless market, leveraging its 5G dominance to drive customer growth and revenue stability. The article details T-Mobile's core business model, its aggressive 5G strategy, and expansion into fixed wireless access, positioning it for sustained demand. It also covers analyst views, competitive advantages, potential risks, and what investors should monitor, suggesting T-Mobile as a core holding for balancing growth and stability.

feed.title: ARE (ARE) director receives 343-share stock grant, holds 30,657
feed.summary: ALEXANDRIA REAL ESTATE EQUITIES, INC. director Steve Hash was granted 343 shares of Common Stock on April 15, 2026, at a price of $0.00 per share, indicating a compensation-related award. Following this transaction, his direct holdings increased to 30,657 shares of the company’s Common Stock. This Form 4 filing reports only the grant and no sales or derivative exercises.

feed.title: Ptc Therapeutics reports inducement grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTCT) has announced inducement grants in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). This news was published on April 17, 2026, and is available to registered members of marketscreener.com. RBC recently adjusted its price target for PTC Therapeutics to $81 from $82, maintaining a Sector Perform rating.

feed.title: EBAY (EBAY) SVP Jordan Sweetnam sells 12,113 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Jordan Sweetnam, SVP, Chief Commercial Officer at EBAY Inc. (EBAY), sold a total of 12,113 shares of company common stock on April 15, 2026. These sales, executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in August 2025, were conducted in two open-market transactions with prices ranging from $99.78 to $101.21. Following these transactions, Sweetnam directly holds 30,835 shares of EBAY common stock.

feed.title: Moderna to Present Phase 1/2 Data on Its Investigational Cancer Antigen Therapy mRNA-4359 as First-Line Therapy in Combination with Pembrolizumab in Locally Advanced or Metastatic Melanoma at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
feed.summary: Moderna announced it will present promising Phase 1/2 data for its investigational cancer antigen therapy mRNA-4359 in combination with pembrolizumab as a first-line treatment for advanced melanoma at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting. The study showed an 83% overall response rate and a 92% disease control rate among 12 participants, with a manageable safety profile. The U.S. FDA has granted Fast Track designation for this combination therapy for checkpoint inhibitor refractory unresectable or metastatic melanoma with PD-L1+ tumors.

feed.title: Walmart to modernize 58 Florida stores in 2026, here's the list
feed.summary: Walmart plans to remodel 58 of its Florida stores in 2026 as part of a nationwide modernization effort to enhance the in-store and digital shopping experience. These upgrades, which are part of a $1.5 billion investment in Florida over five years, will include new layouts, technology, updated pharmacies, and Vision Centers. The company aims to make shopping faster and more convenient for customers, offering services like swift pickup and delivery.

feed.title: EBAY (EBAY) director Brian Sharples receives 892 RSUs valued at $66,438
feed.summary: EBAY director Brian Sharples was granted 892 restricted stock units (RSUs) valued at $66,438 for his service as a non-employee director, starting March 20, 2026. These RSUs represent one common share each and will vest on the earlier of June 25, 2026, or the first annual stockholder meeting after the grant date, provided he continues his service. This compensation award is a pro-rated portion of the company's annual director grant.

feed.title: RDW (NYSE: RDW) shows multiple large affiliated stock resales on Form 144
feed.summary: Redwire Corp (NYSE: RDW) filed a Form 144, revealing numerous resale transactions of common stock by affiliated holders, AE Red Holdings, LLC and Edge Autonomy Ultimate Holdings, LP. These sales, occurring between January 28, 2026, and April 16, 2026, include large block dispositions, with AE Red Holdings' largest trade being 3,127,805 shares and Edge Autonomy's largest trade being 4,372,195 shares, both on March 24, 2026. The filing provides details on the number of shares sold and gross proceeds for each transaction.

feed.title: Carrier Global (CARR) director receives 3,330 Deferred Stock Units grant
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corp director Maximilian Viessmann was granted 3,330 Deferred Stock Units (DSUs) as part of his routine compensation plan. Each DSU was valued at $58.55, and this grant increases his total DSU holdings to 11,855.5681 units. These DSUs will convert into Carrier common shares upon his departure from the board, either as a lump sum or in installments.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Space snags $850M contract for nuclear missile work
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Space has been awarded an $850.4 million contract for continued work on the Trident II nuclear missile. More than half of the work for this contract will be performed at the company's headquarters in Jefferson County, Colorado. The deal was announced by the Pentagon.
